title: Some validation/error branches lack dedicated tests (coverage 93.9%)
evidence: src/validation.ts:27-37 (year/isbn type checks) and src/app.ts:51-53,65-66,101-102 (non-integer :id -> 400) are not exercised by tests/books.test.ts; test_coverage=0.939 in scores.json
suggestion: Add tests for invalid year/isbn types and non-integer id paths to reach full branch coverage

title: PUT /books/:id with an empty body is a silent no-op (200)
evidence: src/app.ts:76 uses partial validation; an empty {} body passes validation and src/app.ts:81-96 writes back existing values, returning 200 with the unchanged book
suggestion: Optionally reject empty update payloads with 400, or document the no-op behaviour

title: GET /books?author= (empty value) filters to an empty result
evidence: src/app.ts:40 treats any string author (including "") as a filter, so ?author= returns no books rather than the full list
suggestion: Optionally ignore blank author filters and return the full collection
